name: agency_model_persistence_incident

confirmed_root_causes.title: models.organization_id does not exist on live DB
confirmed_root_causes.impact: uploadModelPhoto/uploadPrivateModelPhoto audit queries return 400; assertOrgContext fails; audit logs skipped
confirmed_root_causes.fix: Replaced with resolveOrgIdForModel() helper: models.agency_id -> organizations JOIN

confirmed_root_causes.title: send-invite CORS headers missing on POST responses
confirmed_root_causes.impact: Browser blocks all non-OPTIONS responses; invite/resend completely broken from web
confirmed_root_causes.fix: Added getCorsHeaders(req) + jsonResponse() helper; CORS on every response; allowlist: index-casting.com, www, indexcasting.com

confirmed_root_causes.title: buildEditState useEffect dependency only watches selectedModel?.id
confirmed_root_causes.impact: After save of same model, form shows stale city/country/location values

confirmed_root_causes.title: importModelAndMerge INSERT uses .single() — risk of 406/PGRST116
confirmed_root_causes.impact: If RLS blocks SELECT after INSERT, importModelAndMerge returns null -> photos never uploaded
confirmed_root_causes.fix: Changed to .select('id').maybeSingle() + null guard with explicit error message

confirmed_root_causes.title: upsertPhotosForModel missing file_size_bytes in payload
confirmed_root_causes.impact: Add-model photos stored with file_size_bytes=0; deletePhoto storage decrement incorrect
confirmed_root_causes.fix: Added file_size_bytes to upsert payload; handleAddModel now passes fileSizeBytes from upload result

false_alarms.reason: Expected startup noise — Supabase client attempts platform check before session exists
RPC uses .maybeSingle() correctly; likely misattributed — real 406 source is INSERT .single() (RC-4)
Intentionally transient — 60-min audit window (rightsAuditWindowActive) handles re-upload permission. Checkbox state does NOT affect display of saved images

live_schema_findings.upsert_model_location: Correct: ON CONFLICT(model_id, source), auth-split, GPS preservation
live_schema_findings.model_photos_rls: Agency INSERT/SELECT/UPDATE/DELETE via models.agency_id -> organizations -> organization_members

safe_fixes: src/services/modelPhotosSupabase.ts — resolveOrgIdForModel helper + 2x audit query replacement
supabase/functions/send-invite/index.ts — CORS headers on all responses (deployed + verified)
deferred_items: Checkbox UX text could mention '60-min upload window' more clearly — cosmetic, not a bug
model_photos.agency_id not set during upsertPhotosForModel — agency_id is nullable, RLS uses models.agency_id JOIN
handleAddModel does not check upsertPhotosForModel return value — fails silently if upsert returns []
do_not_touch: Discovery / Near-Me / Location priority live > current > agency
